name: acceptance-test-workflow
description: Test acceptance-test skill activation for service test discovery, environment resolution, and execution planning

steps.name: discover-tests
steps.prompt: what acceptance tests does the partition service have? just tell me what's available

assertions.description: Identifies available test modules in the partition repo

steps.name: resolve-environment
steps.prompt: what environment variables are needed for partition acceptance tests against a cimpl environment?

steps.name: execution-plan
steps.prompt: what is the build order for partition test modules? which modules need to be installed first?

assertions.description: Knows test-core must be built first

steps.name: boundary-test
steps.prompt: what Postman smoke test collections are available for cimpl/lab?

assertions.description: Boundary: routes to osdu-qa domain, not acceptance-test
